rules.rule_text:
title: Salty 2FA Phish-as-a-Service credentials exfiltration
id: 3d019406-ad2f-4cb6-bfda-66ddf5e2d274
description: Detects URL pattern matching Salty 2FA data exfiltration
references:
- https://any.run/cybersecurity-blog/salty2fa-technical-analysis/
status: test
author: NTT Security - Andreas Foureaux
date: 2025-08-22
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    http_method|cased: POST
    url_host|endswith: .ru
    uri_path|re: ^/[0-9]{5,6}\.php
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unlikely, but check if user visited a phishing site just prior.
level: high
